selection_policy: serving_by_ACTIVE_MODEL_pointer; compare MAPE, MAE, R2, n_test and data-policy stability before activation
reason: Pinned verified production model: official test MAPE 16.0864%, test MAE 776,510,800 VND, test R2 0.8449 on n_test=485. Historical snapshot 20260503_185414 has lower MAPE 14.1962% but higher MAE 804,022,708 VND, lower R2 0.7648 and smaller n_test=456, so it is shown as best-by-MAPE history, not the current serving model. Later retrains are kept as candidates because their serving metrics are worse.
